# LUXHT Fix
> Professional home repair and handyman services serving Central Florida (Orlando) and South Florida (Miami). We specialize in drywall repair, TV mounting, flooring, bathroom remodels, and smart home installations.

## Main Services and Locations
- [Services Hub](https://fix.luxht.com/services/): A full list of all home repair services.
- [Orlando Services](https://fix.luxht.com/): Handyman and remodeling services in Central Florida, including Winter Park, Lake Nona, and Dr. Phillips.
- [Miami Services](https://fix.luxht.com/): Handyman and remodeling services in South Florida, including Fort Lauderdale, Coral Gables, and Pembroke Pines.

## Key Facts
- LUXHT Fix has served over 500+ happy customers across Florida with a 4.9+ star rating.
- We offer transparent pricing with starting costs explicitly listed for all major services.
- All technicians are fully licensed, insured, and thoroughly vetted.
- We guarantee same-week service for most standard repair and installation jobs.

## Contact Information
- Website: https://fix.luxht.com/
- Support: Use the contact forms or call the numbers listed on our website for an instant quote.
